c_tier.thesis: AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL GROUP, INC. (AIG) — Score: 46 Quality: score 68/100 — moderate fundamentals. Valuation: score 55/100 — moderate valuation signal. Catalyst: score 30/100 — limited catalyst activity (recent filing). This is a research candidate, not a buy/sell recommendation. Not validated for decision use.
c_tier.why_now: Why now: recent filing activity only.

review.missed_risk: insurance-specific quality metrics may be unreliable
review.missing_evidence: actual 8-K descriptions, earnings date, reserve release trend, short interest trend, insurance-specific margin validation
review.review_notes: P/E=13.8 and P/B=1.04 look real. Volume spike 2.79x is worth watching. Net margin signal may be distorted for insurance. No clear near-term catalyst.

c_tier.thesis: AFLAC INC (AFL) — Score: 45 Quality: score 76/100 — solid business fundamentals. Valuation: score 44/100 — moderate valuation signal. Catalyst: score 30/100 — limited catalyst activity (recent filing). This is a research candidate, not a buy/sell recommendation. Not validated for decision use.
c_tier.why_now: Why now: recent filing activity only.

review.missed_risk: no near-term catalyst and limited MHDE edge
review.missing_evidence: Q1 2026 earnings date, short interest trend, Japan FX exposure impact, specific catalyst evidence
review.review_notes: Quality appears genuine, but this is a well-covered large-cap insurer. Useful calibration case. Current evidence does not show a strong catalyst.

top_reject.why_rejected: Total score too low (45 < 45). Missing data: momentum, sentiment

review.missed_risk: shares XBRL missing and valuation artifact
review.review_notes: Cheap score is driven by data artifact. P/S=0.003 and P/B=0.002 are not credible. Shares concept missing or denominator broken. Negative equity breaks P/B. Revenue growth appears to be a period mismatch. Do not review further until data fix.

top_reject.why_rejected: Total score too low (44 < 45). Missing data: momentum, sentiment

review.missing_evidence: 20+ days price history, Q1 2026 earnings date, revenue growth verification from 10-K, catalyst evidence
review.review_notes: Most credible candidate in batch. P/E=8.15 and 22% margin appear credible. Specialty reinsurer at real value, but missing price history and no catalyst yet. Mark as watch and revisit when momentum history accumulates.

review.missed_risk: foreign filer currency mismatch and stale EPS
review.review_notes: Foreign private issuer using CNY financials vs USD price makes valuation ratios meaningless. EPS appears stale from 2010. 6-K filings are not being scored properly. Detect 20-F filers and skip or normalize foreign filer ratios.

review_instructions.purpose: Fill in the 'review' block for each candidate you investigate. Import completed reviews with: python main.py review import <path>
review_instructions.score_range: 1 (lowest) to 5 (highest), or null if not assessed
